scripts.start:dev: npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @trpg/shared-types && cross-env PORT=8080 nest start --watch
scripts.test:server-db: npm run build -w @trpg/shared-types && cross-env RUN_SERVER_DB_TESTS=1 jest --config jest.config.ts --runInBand test/server-scenario-db.spec.ts
scripts.test:p0-regression: npm run --silent build -w @trpg/shared-types && jest --config jest.quiet.config.ts --silent ai.service.spec.ts command-parser.service.spec.ts action-rule.service.spec.ts action-processor.service.spec.ts actions.service.spec.ts level-up.service.spec.ts characters.service.spec.ts rest-resolution.service.spec.ts condition-runtime.service.spec.ts concentration-runtime.service.spec.ts cover-position.service.spec.ts forced-movement.service.spec.ts aoe-targeting.service.spec.ts aoe-damage.service.spec.ts ready-action.service.spec.ts combat-spell.service.spec.ts spell-slot.service.spec.ts spell-scaling.service.spec.ts monster-ability.service.spec.ts item-interaction.service.spec.ts inventory-runtime.service.spec.ts terrain-effect.service.spec.ts gm-override.service.spec.ts combat.service.spec.ts sessions.service.spec.ts default-scenario.spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:p1-regression: npm run --silent build -w @trpg/shared-types && jest --config jest.quiet.config.ts --silent command-parser.service.spec.ts action-rule.service.spec.ts action-processor.service.spec.ts rule-catalog.service.spec.ts level-up.service.spec.ts characters.service.spec.ts rest-resolution.service.spec.ts combat-spell.service.spec.ts spell-slot.service.spec.ts spell-scaling.service.spec.ts monster-ability.service.spec.ts combat.service.spec.ts default-scenario.spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:p2-regression: npm run --silent build -w @trpg/shared-types && jest --config jest.quiet.config.ts --silent content-manifest.spec.ts command-parser.service.spec.ts rule-catalog.service.spec.ts level-up.service.spec.ts spell-slot.service.spec.ts rest-resolution.service.spec.ts characters.service.spec.ts action-rule.service.spec.ts action-processor.service.spec.ts aoe-damage.service.spec.ts combat.service.spec.ts monster-ability.service.spec.ts item-interaction.service.spec.ts terrain-effect.service.spec.ts default-scenario.spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:p3-regression: npm run --silent build -w @trpg/shared-types && jest --config jest.quiet.config.ts --silent content-manifest.spec.ts p3-item-manifest.spec.ts rule-catalog.service.spec.ts level-up.service.spec.ts spell-slot.service.spec.ts rest-resolution.service.spec.ts characters.service.spec.ts action-rule.service.spec.ts action-processor.service.spec.ts aoe-damage.service.spec.ts combat.service.spec.ts monster-ability.service.spec.ts item-interaction.service.spec.ts actions.service.spec.ts scenarios.service.spec.ts sessions.service.spec.ts provided-scenario.constants.spec.ts default-scenario.spec.ts --runInBand
scripts.test:p4-regression: npm run --silent build -w @trpg/shared-types && jest --config jest.quiet.config.ts --silent no-destructive-db-test.spec.ts ai.service.spec.ts content-manifest.spec.ts p3-item-manifest.spec.ts command-parser.service.spec.ts rule-catalog.service.spec.ts level-up.service.spec.ts spell-slot.service.spec.ts spell-scaling.service.spec.ts spellcasting-progression.spec.ts rest-resolution.service.spec.ts characters.service.spec.ts action-rule.service.spec.ts action-processor.service.spec.ts condition-runtime.service.spec.ts concentration-runtime.service.spec.ts cover-position.service.spec.ts forced-movement.service.spec.ts aoe-targeting.service.spec.ts aoe-damage.service.spec.ts ready-action.service.spec.ts combat-spell.service.spec.ts combat.service.spec.ts monster-ability.service.spec.ts item-interaction.service.spec.ts inventory-runtime.service.spec.ts terrain-effect.service.spec.ts gm-override.service.spec.ts economy-runtime.service.spec.ts economy-state-runtime.service.spec.ts scenario-collaboration-policy.service.spec.ts actions.service.spec.ts scenarios.service.spec.ts sessions.service.spec.ts provided-scenario.constants.spec.ts default-scenario.spec.ts --runInBand
